inbox.title: Support inbox
inbox.description: Triage customer and partner tickets, keep public replies separate from internal notes, and record assignment, priority, category, and status changes from one operator console.

permissionDenied.title: Support permission required
permissionDenied.description: This account cannot read the admin support queue. Use a support, admin, or owner role with support ticket read permission.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Public id, safe account/workspace id, subject

assignment.unassignedScopeHint: Unassigned is filtered on the current {count}-ticket page because the admin API has no backend unassigned filter yet. Narrow the queue with search or status for exact triage.

list.empty: No support tickets match the current filters.

detail.empty: Select a ticket from the inbox to inspect the conversation.
detail.conversationDescription: Public replies and gated internal notes are rendered as separate message types.
detail.noMessages: No messages are attached to this ticket yet.
detail.publicPreviewEmpty: No public reply has been recorded yet.
detail.noEvents: No audit events are attached to this ticket yet.

actions.title: Ticket controls
actions.description: Update metadata and lifecycle without touching billing, VPN provisioning, or entitlement state.
actions.readOnly: This role can inspect support tickets but cannot reply, note, assign, or change lifecycle state.
actions.assignedAdminPlaceholder: Admin UUID or blank for unassigned

reply.title: Public reply
reply.description: Visible to the customer or partner and may trigger notification workflows.
reply.placeholder: Write a public support reply. Do not include secrets, payment card numbers, private keys, or VPN credential URLs.

internalNote.title: Internal note
internalNote.description: Admin-only context. This composer never writes to the public reply endpoint.
internalNote.placeholder: Record operator-only context, escalation notes, or safe audit breadcrumbs.

feedback.messageTooLong: Message must be {count} characters or fewer.
